description: Source-of-truth definitions for all NetWebMedia pipeline automations. Loaded into resources(type=workflow) by api-php/seed-automations.php. Re-run seeder anytime — workflows are upserted by slug.

steps.subject: Welcome to NetWebMedia, {{first_name|there}}
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name|there}},

You're in. We send one short email a week — no fluff, just what's working in AI-powered marketing for SMBs.

— Carlos

steps.subject: The 14 niches we go deep on
steps.body: Quick value drop: every NetWebMedia playbook is built for one of 14 niches. Reply with yours and I'll send the niche-specific deck.

else.message: Subscriber not engaged after 6d — staying as subscriber

steps.subject: Audit request received — your roadmap arrives in 48h
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name|there}},

Got it. Your custom 90-day growth roadmap will be in your inbox within 48 hours. While you wait, you can book a 30-min strategy call here.

— Carlos

steps.message: 🟧 New audit request: {{company|?}} ({{email}}). Deal created and assigned.

steps.subject: Your audit roadmap is ready, {{first_name|there}}
steps.body: Roadmap attached. Three quick wins inside + the 90-day plan. Book the walkthrough here.

else.subject: Did the audit make sense, {{first_name|there}}?
else.body: Open invite: 30-min strategy call, no pressure. Pick a time here.
Hi {{first_name|there}} — Carlos at NetWebMedia. Did the audit roadmap land okay? Happy to walk you through it whenever.

steps.prompt_tpl: Draft a 3-sentence personalized reply to this cold email response. Their reply: '{{reply_body}}'. They are at {{company|?}} in {{niche|the SMB}} space. Tone: friendly, helpful, no pitch. Sign off as Carlos.

steps.title_tpl: Review & send AI-drafted reply to {{first_name|?}} at {{company|?}}

steps.message: 💬 Cold email reply from {{email}} ({{company|?}}). AI draft ready. Task created.

then.message: 🔥 {{email}} ({{company|?}}) visited /pricing {{visit_count}}× — likely buying. Reach out today.

then.subject: Saw you checking out our pricing — questions?
then.body:
Hi {{first_name|there}}, noticed you've been on our pricing page. Happy to walk you through what fits your situation — reply with your top 1-2 questions and I'll answer same-day.

— Carlos

steps.message: Cron: scanning for contacts with last_contact > 30d and no opens

steps.subject: We've shipped 30+ new modules since you checked
steps.body: {{first_name|Hi}} — quick note: NetWebMedia added AI Agents, an Agency tier, and 30 new modules since your last visit. See what's new →

else.subject: Last note — one more reason to stay
else.body: AI Agents + Agency tier are the headline. See current pricing →

steps.subject: Thank you for the review, {{first_name|there}} 🙏
steps.body:
That review just made our week. As a thanks: here's REFER15 — anyone you refer gets 15% off their first 3 months and you get $200 credit when they convert.

— Carlos

steps.title_tpl: Send hand-written thank-you card to {{first_name|?}} at {{company|?}}

steps.message: ⭐ New review from {{company|?}}. Tagged evangelist. Referral coupon sent.
Contact moved to disqualified lifecycle stage

steps.subject: One thing most {{niche|SMB}} owners get wrong about marketing
steps.body: Hi {{first_name|there}}, one quick observation from auditing 100+ {{niche|SMB}} sites this year...

steps.subject: How {{niche|one of our clients}} cut their cost-per-lead 62%
steps.body: Short case study + the exact playbook we used. Read here →

steps.subject: Want me to audit your setup, {{first_name|there}}?
steps.body: Free 90-day growth roadmap, no obligation. Request your audit here →

steps.subject: 1 year with NetWebMedia 🎉
steps.body: {{first_name|There}} — 1 year today. Thank you. Here's LOYAL20 for 20% off your next add-on or upgrade.

steps.subject: Keep 100% of the client AND 100% of the markup
steps.body: Hi {{first_name|there}}, partner application received. Sub-accounts, white-label, Stripe Connect — let's get you onboarded. Book onboarding call →

steps.subject: How one partner hit $34k/mo net in 90 days
steps.body: Exact playbook on our Agency tier. Get the partner playbook →

steps.subject: Founder pricing closes soon, {{first_name|there}}
steps.body: 6 founder slots left — lifetime price lock. Claim my founder slot →

then.message: 💎 HIGH-VALUE new deal: {{title}} — ${{value}}. Routed to least-loaded rep.

workflows.title: Sales · Contacted Stage SLA (3-day stale alert)

then.message: Deal {{title}} ({{company|?}}) has been in 'Contacted' for 3 days. Push to Qualified or back to New Lead.

steps.prompt_tpl: Draft a one-page proposal outline for {{company|the prospect}} in the {{niche|SMB}} space. Their needs: {{notes|build full digital presence}}. Deal value target: ${{value}}. Include: (1) one-line problem statement, (2) 3-bullet solution, (3) deliverables, (4) timeline, (5) investment. Concise, scannable.

steps.title_tpl: Send proposal to {{company|?}} within 48h (AI outline ready)

steps.message: ✅ Deal qualified: {{title}}. AI proposal outline drafted. 48h SLA started.

steps.subject: Quick check-in on the proposal, {{first_name|there}}
steps.body:
Just making sure the proposal landed and answering any questions before the team meeting. Anything I can clarify?

— Carlos

then.body: Hey {{first_name|there}}, Carlos here. Quick WhatsApp follow-up on the NetWebMedia proposal — got 5 min for a quick call this week?

then.subject: Two quick options if budget is the question
then.body: Sometimes proposals stall on scope. Happy to send a phased option (start small, expand quarterly) if that's useful — just say the word.

then.message: ⏰ Proposal {{title}} ({{company|?}}) — 9 days no movement. Owner: review or re-stage.

then.prompt_tpl: We've been in negotiation 5+ days on deal {{title}} (${{value}}, {{company|?}}, niche {{niche|SMB}}). Notes: {{notes|none}}. Suggest: (1) likely sticking point, (2) one concrete concession that protects margin, (3) a soft-close line for the next call. 6-bullet max.

then.message: 🟥 Carlos: {{title}} stalled in Negotiation (${{value}}). AI playbook drafted in deal notes.

steps.subject: Welcome to NetWebMedia, {{first_name|there}} 🎉
steps.body:
Officially in. Three things happen now:

  1. Your kickoff call is being scheduled — calendar link incoming.
  2. Your account dashboard is live at netwebmedia.com/crm.
  3. Your CSM will reach out within 24h with the intake form.

— Carlos

steps.message: 🎉 CLOSED WON: {{title}} — ${{value}} ({{company|?}}). Onboarding tasks created. CSM alerted.

steps.subject: Your 10-minute first win on the platform
steps.body: Quick guided walkthrough — Contacts + Pipeline + Automations done in ten minutes. Start here →

workflows.title: Sales · Closed Lost → Reason Capture & 90d Recycle

steps.subject: No worries — quick favor, {{first_name|there}}?
steps.body:
Totally understand the timing wasn't right. One favor: 1-line reply with what tipped it (price / timing / fit / other). Helps us improve. Door's open whenever.

— Carlos

steps.subject: 90 days later — what's changed at {{company|your company}}
steps.body: Hey {{first_name|there}}, checking back in. We've shipped a lot since we last spoke — happy to send a 5-min recap if useful.

steps.message: Cron scan: open deals where days_in_stage > stage SLA
📋 Daily stale-deal report — see /pipeline?filter=stale for details.

then.message: 💎 EXEC FYI: {{title}} qualified at ${{value}}. Owner: {{owner_name|?}}. Carlos — review thread.

then.prompt_tpl: Draft 3 strategic questions Carlos should ask on the next call with {{company|?}} ({{niche|SMB}}, ${{value}} deal). Focus on: decision authority, success metrics, competitive landscape. Concise.

steps.prompt_tpl: Draft a friendly 1-line text-back for a missed call from {{first_name|there}} at {{company|?}}. Offer to call back or schedule a time. Sign as Carlos. No emojis.

steps.body: Hey {{first_name|there}} — Carlos at NetWebMedia, just missed your call. Best time to call you back today, or want to schedule? Calendar: https://netwebmedia.com/contact

then.message: 📞 Missed call from {{first_name|?}} (open deal: {{deal_title}}). Auto-text sent.

steps.subject: Confirmed: {{appointment_title}} on {{appointment_date}}
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name|there}}, confirmed for {{appointment_date}} at {{appointment_time}}. Add to calendar: {{calendar_link}}. See you then.

— Carlos
Booked ✅ — {{appointment_title}} on {{appointment_date}} at {{appointment_time}}. Reply if anything changes.

steps.subject: Reminder: we meet today at {{appointment_time}}
steps.body: Quick reminder — see you today at {{appointment_time}}. Link: {{meeting_link}}

else.body: Hey {{first_name|there}} — looks like we missed each other. Want to reschedule? Same calendar link works.

steps.subject: We missed you, {{first_name|there}} — easy to reschedule
steps.body:
No worries, things come up. Use the same calendar link to grab a new time: book here. Or reply with a couple of times that work.

— Carlos
Hi {{first_name|there}} — Carlos here. Want to grab 15 min this week instead? Easier than back-and-forth.

steps.message: Weekly scan: deals with no activity in 14d → reduce probability 20%
📉 Weekly probability decay applied. Check pipeline for re-prioritization.

workflows.title: Sales · New Customer Tag → AI Welcome

steps.prompt_tpl: Write a 4-sentence personalized welcome email for a new NetWebMedia customer. Company: {{company|?}}, niche: {{niche|SMB}}, plan: {{plan|Pro}}. Mention one specific module relevant to their niche. Warm, founder-tone. Sign as Carlos.

steps.subject: Welcome aboard, {{first_name|there}} — quick personal note
steps.body: {{personalized_welcome}}

steps.message: 👋 New customer tagged: {{company|?}} ({{niche|SMB}}). AI welcome sent. Delivery team — pick up.
